inputs.label: Waste Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the category of waste to apply appropriate cost factors and regulatory thresholds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the category of waste to apply appropriate cost factors and regulatory thresholds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygun maliyet faktörlerini ve düzenleyici eşikleri uygulamak için atık kategorisini seçin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie die Abfallkategorie, um entsprechende Kostenfaktoren und regulatorische Schwellenwerte anzuwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez la catégorie de déchet pour appliquer les facteurs de coût et les seuils réglementaires appropriés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione la categoría de desperdicio para aplicar factores de coste y umbrales regulatorios adecuados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر فئة النفايات لتطبيق عوامل التكلفة المناسبة وحدود التنبيه التنظيمية.

inputs.label: Waste Volume (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of waste generated in the reporting period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of waste generated in the reporting period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Raporlama döneminde üretilen toplam atık kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmasse des im Berichtszeitraum erzeugten Abfalls.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale des déchets générés au cours de la période de déclaration.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total de desperdicio generado en el período de reporte.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكتلة الإجمالية للنفايات المولدة في فترة التقرير.

inputs.label: Disposal Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Average cost paid to waste management vendor per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost paid to waste management vendor per kilogram.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık yönetimi tedarikçisine kilogram başına ödenen ortalama maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten, die pro Kilogramm an den Abfallentsorgungsdienstleister gezahlt werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen payé au prestataire de gestion des déchets par kilogramme.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste promedio pagado al proveedor de gestión de desperdicios por kilogramo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التكلفة المدفوعة لشركة إدارة النفايات لكل كيلوغرام.

inputs.label: Transport Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: One-way distance from facility to disposal or recycling site.

businessContext_i18n.en: One-way distance from facility to disposal or recycling site.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesisten bertaraf veya geri dönüşüm sahasına tek yön mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einfache Entfernung von der Anlage zur Entsorgungs- oder Recyclingstelle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance aller simple de l'installation au site d'élimination ou de recyclage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia de ida desde la instalación hasta el sitio de eliminación o reciclaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة في اتجاه واحد من المنشأة إلى موقع التخلص أو إعادة التدوير.

inputs.label: Transport Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilometer for waste transport, including fuel and labor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per kilometer for waste transport, including fuel and labor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt ve işçilik dahil atık taşıma için kilometre başına maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro Kilometer für den Abfalltransport, einschließlich Kraftstoff und Arbeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût par kilomètre pour le transport des déchets, incluant le carburant et la main-d'œuvre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo por kilómetro para el transporte de residuos, incluyendo combustible y mano de obra.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة لكل كيلومتر لنقل النفايات، بما في ذلك الوقود والعمالة.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Ton
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor hours required to handle, sort, and prepare one ton of waste.

label_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra por tonelada

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor hours required to handle, sort, and prepare one ton of waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ton atığı elleçlemek, ayırmak ve hazırlamak için gereken doğrudan işçilik saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Arbeitsstunden, die für die Handhabung, Sortierung und Vorbereitung einer Tonne Abfall erforderlich sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de travail direct nécessaires pour manipuler, trier et préparer une tonne de déchets.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra directa requeridas para manejar, clasificar y preparar una tonelada de residuos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ساعات العمل المباشرة المطلوبة للتعامل مع طن واحد من النفايات وفرزه وتحضيره.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage including overhead for waste handling personnel.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage including overhead for waste handling personnel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık elleçleme personeli için genel giderler dahil saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stundenlohn inklusive Gemeinkosten für das Abfallpersonal.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire incluant les charges pour le personnel de gestion des déchets.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario por hora incluyendo gastos generales para el personal de manejo de residuos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الأجر بالساعة بما في ذلك التكاليف الإضافية لعمال التعامل مع النفايات.

inputs.label: Recycling Revenue per kg
inputs.businessContext: Revenue received from selling recyclable materials per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Revenue received from selling recyclable materials per kilogram.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri dönüştürülebilir malzemelerin kilogram başına satışından elde edilen gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erlös aus dem Verkauf von recycelbaren Materialien pro Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu provenant de la vente de matériaux recyclables par kilogramme.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos recibidos por la venta de materiales reciclables por kilogramo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الإيرادات المستلمة من بيع المواد القابلة لإعادة التدوير لكل كيلوغرام.

rules.message: Hazardous waste volume exceeds 100 kg – special handling and documentation required.
Recycling rate must be between 0 and 100 percent.
Disposal cost per kg cannot be negative.

thresholds.message: Waste volume exceeds regulatory limit – potential compliance penalty.
Recycling rate is below 20% – consider improvement initiatives.
Carbon cost per kg CO2e is high – explore emission reduction opportunities.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
